creator: brandon.wandersee@gmail.com
text: I can confirm this behavior on 10.3-RELEASE-p7, with sysutils/beadm (as opposed to sysutils/beadm-devel). Boot environments created and activated in user space work just fine, but a boot environment selected from the loader menu (UEFI with vt(4) in my case) will not boot in either single- or multi-user mode.
